summary: Frontend testing of 7 new LED Sign Design Tool features. Found and FIXED 1 critical bug (WIRING_COLOR undefined). All 7 features verified working: Border pixels cyan, Fill pixels green, BS/BE/FS/FE markers, Wire Connect tool, Port Eye/EyeOff icons, Break Apart with Approve button, Approved counter in status bar, Border/Fill count separate.

issues: Minor: Status bar spacing between elements could be improved (carryover from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: LedCanvas.jsx line 195 used undefined WIRING_COLOR constant - Added 'const WIRING_COLOR = rgba(255,200,30,0.7)' to fix
seed_data_creation: None - font file /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 new features working correctly. Key test steps: 1) Upload font via data-testid='font-file-input', 2) Set text (HI recommended for faster tests), 3) Set font size to 30cm, 4) Click Generate, 5) Use Break Apart mode to test Approve/Unapprove buttons, 6) Wire Connect tool is 4th tool button. Port buttons P1-P8 have Eye/EyeOff icons - click to toggle visibility. Status bar shows 'Approved: X/Y' counter.

test_features_verified.border_pixels_cyan: PASS - Border count color is rgb(0, 212, 255) = #00d4ff
test_features_verified.fill_pixels_green: PASS - Fill count color is rgb(107, 203, 119) = #6bcb77
test_features_verified.bs_be_fs_fe_markers: PASS - BS (Border Start), BE (Border End), FS (Fill Start), FE (Fill End) markers render correctly on canvas
test_features_verified.wire_connect_tool_visible: PASS - 4th tool button with Cable icon at data-testid='tool-wireconnect'
test_features_verified.port_buttons_eye_icons: PASS - All 8 port buttons (P1-P8) have Eye/EyeOff icons, ports hidden by default
test_features_verified.break_apart_with_approve: PASS - Break Apart mode shows 'Approve Letter Wiring' button when letter is selected
test_features_verified.approve_unapprove_toggle: PASS - After approving, shows 'Unapprove Letter Wiring' button
test_features_verified.status_bar_approved_counter: PASS - Status bar shows 'Approved: X/Y' (e.g., 'Approved: 1/2' after approving letter H)
test_features_verified.pixel_count_border_fill_separate: PASS - Export panel shows Total, Border (cyan), Fill (green) counts separately

bug_fixed.fix: Added 'const WIRING_COLOR = rgba(255,200,30,0.7)' constant definition at line 6
bug_fixed.root_cause: Variable was used but never defined - likely removed during refactoring
